step_rationale: RGD-motif disintegrin antagonizing platelet GPIIb/IIIa and collagen adhesion.
mechanism: rLj-RGD3 inhibits platelet adhesion and aggregation by blocking integrin-mediated interaction with the thrombogenic substrate.

references.title: rLj-RGD3, a novel recombinant toxin protein from Lampetra japonica, prevents coronary thrombosis-induced acute myocardial infarction by inhibiting platelet functions in rats.
